roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA PURS PC1018 FILED
DEFT'S MOTION BAIL HEARING, RELEASE OR, OR BAIL REDUCTION FILED
/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT - NON COMPL/INTC/SHER/BAIL:25000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/VD:PREHEARING CONF ON 01-08-20/CONTD:PREHEARINGCONF AND STATUS OF 20000373/DOP/

/CAL: STATUS OF 19019845/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,//CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:09-09-19/987,2//ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:DEFENDANT TO REPORT ANY ARREST, CITATION OR LAW ENFORCEMENT CONTACT TO SFPD COMMUNITY PROGRAM EMPLOYEE ASAP; SUBMIT TO DRUG TEST AS DIRECT; NOT POSSES ANY WEAPON, NOT CONSUME ANY REGULATED SUSTANCE WITHOUT PRESCRIPTION, ADIE ANY STAY AWY ORDER AND CAN NOT TRAVEL MORE THAN 50 DRIVING MILES WITHOUTAPPROVAL OF THE COURT,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONF/DOP/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/X:THIS IS CALENDARED IN ERROR, THIS CASE WAS DISMISSED PC1385 ON 02-11-20/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF 20000373/INTC/X: COURTNO 20000373 WAS DISCHARGED,/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONF/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/BWNUM:1ST/X:2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
